description_long: This helmet features a sleek, aerodynamic shell with a glossy black finish and bold red racing stripes running from the front to the back. The front is dominated by a large, dark-tinted full-face visor that seamlessly integrates into the helmet's smooth contours. Subtle red accents are present around the lower jaw area, adding a touch of contrast and style. The helmet appears to be constructed primarily from a hard, impact-resistant material, likely polycarbonate or fiberglass, with a smooth, reflective surface. No visible ventilation openings or external logos are present, giving it a minimalist, high-performance look. The overall design suggests a focus on both safety and aesthetics, suitable for urban motorcyclists or scooter riders.
description: A glossy black helmet with bold red racing stripes and a dark full-face visor, accented by red details around the jaw. The design is sleek, aerodynamic, and minimalist, with no visible vents or logos.
description_view_0: Front view shows the helmet's smooth, rounded face with two parallel red stripes running vertically and no visible visor details.
description_view_1: Left three-quarter view highlights the large, dark visor and red accent near the jaw, emphasizing the helmet's aerodynamic shape.
description_view_2: Top view displays the full length of the red racing stripes and the helmet's symmetrical, streamlined profile.
description_view_3: Right three-quarter view mirrors the left, showing the visor, red jaw accent, and the helmet's glossy curvature.
attribute_graphic_design: Glossy black base with two bold red racing stripes running from front to back and red jaw accents; no other graphics or motifs.
